title: DEKTON DT71210 12X1500MM 5 Digit Combination Cable Lock with Holder Padlock, Black and Blue
features: BIKE LOCK 1.5mtr with 5 digit combination and bracket
WEATHER RESISTANT tough and durable in all conditions
HEAVY DUTY multi strand twisted steel cable 1.5mtr x 1.5cm with protective PVC coating
IDEAL FOR motorbikes, bicycles, ladders and more
ADVANCED security rating 6 and the highest level of weather resistance
description: From the manufacturer 12 X 1500MM 5 DIGIT COMBINATION CABLE LOCK WITH HOLDER 12 x 1500mm 5 digit combination cable lock with holder. Weather resistant tough and durable in all conditions. Heavy duty multi strand twisted steel cable with protective PVC coating. Ideal for securing motorbikes, bicycles, ladders and much more. ADVANCED LEVEL OF SECURITY MULTI-FUNCTIONAL CABLE LOCK Made of 12mm thick steel cable and covered with PVC protection. The length of the cable is 1500mm, long enough to protect bicycles, scooters, doors or other items from theft. SELF COILING CABLE WITH MOUNTING CABLE The bike lock comes with a mounting holder, and the self-coiling cable can be clipped to the bracket when not in use for easy carrying. It will not deform under high temperature. ADVANCED 5 DIGIT COMBINATION 5 digit combination increases the level of protection against unwanted access. 100,000 possible combinations. Wheels tightly fixed, making decoding almost impossible. IDEAL FOR SECURING Motorbikes / Bicycles. Tools / Gardening equipment. Ladders. Doors/ Gates. Sheds / Fences. Factories / Garages.
